scripts.dev:server: npm run build:shared && npm run dev -w @game-platform/server | node pretty-log.mjs
scripts.dev:web: npm run build:shared && npm run dev -w @game-platform/web
scripts.build:server: npm run build:shared && npm run build -w @game-platform/server
scripts.build: npm install --no-audit --no-fund && npm run build:shared && npm run build:server
